title: Missing numbers on the number line
description: Practice more challenging problems where you identify positive and negative integers on a number line that doesn't have zero labeled.
topic_path: Missing numbers on the number line

assessment_items.question_content:
The blue dot is at what value on the number line?

 

 ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/44eb7a9e84f0b9a32fe51d0931b766f1b2c8a664)

[[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints: Two tick marks are labeled.
The distance between the two labeled tick marks is $6$.
Therefore, the space between each pair of tick marks is $6 / 2 = 3$

Label the other tick marks on the number line.

 ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0ae0c990f380559c24445bb315200feff63f656f)

The blue dot represents the number $-19$.

 ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/48d2345cb8872b874284feb023d2e70cc82edab9)
